basic_details.job_title: Bank of Baroda Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Bank of Baroda Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Bank of Baroda . A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the Bank of Baroda Faculty Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 22 to 40 years who have completed Graduate or Post Graduate qualification in any discipline are eligible to apply for these Faculty vacancies. The offline application process for Bank of Baroda Faculty Recruitment 2026 is currently ongoing, and the last date to submit the application form is 20 May 2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and application f

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 22 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age is calculated as on 30 April 2026. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate (any discipline: Science/Commerce/Arts) or Post Graduate, Flair for teaching, Sound computer knowledge, Excellent communication skill in local language (Kumaoni), Skills in typing in local language
qualification.details: Graduate (any discipline: Science/Commerce/Arts) or Post Graduate. Flair for teaching. Sound computer knowledge. Excellent communication skill in local language (Kumaoni for Haldwani) – essential. Skills in typing in local language – essential. Desirable: MSW/MA Rural Development/MA Sociology/MA Psychology/B.Sc.(Veterinary)/B.Sc.(Horticulture)/B.Sc.(Agriculture)/B.Sc.(Agri. Marketing)/B.A.+B.Ed. Fluency in English and Hindi. Typing skills in Hindi/English. Previous experience as faculty.

selection_process: Written Test – to assess General Knowledge and Computer capability Personal Interview – to assess communication ability
developmental approach Demonstration/Presentation – to assess teaching skills and communication capability
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Bank of Baroda Faculty (In House) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for the receipt of applications for the Bank of Baroda Faculty (In House) recruitment is 20 May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Faculty (In House) post?
faq.answer: Candidates should be Graduates (any discipline: Science/Commerce/Arts) or Post Graduates. A flair for teaching, sound computer knowledge, and excellent local language communication skills are also essential.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 22 years, and the maximum age limit is 40 years. The age is calculated as of 30 April 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Faculty (In House) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 40,000.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Faculty (In House) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Faculty (In House) position in this recruitment drive by Bank of Baroda.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What are the desirable qualifications for the Faculty (In House) post?
faq.answer: Desirable qualifications include MSW/MA Rural Development/MA Sociology/MA Psychology/B.Sc.(Veterinary)/B.Sc.(Horticulture)/B.Sc.(Agriculture)/B.Sc.(Agri. Marketing)/B.A.+B.Ed., fluency in English and Hindi, typing skills, and previous faculty experience.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Faculty (In House) role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Written Test, a Personal Interview, and a Demonstration/Presentation to assess various skills.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location for this recruitment is Haldwani, Uttarakhand.
